content.full_text:
March 27, 2002

Trent J. Benedetti, CPA
Benedetti & Associates
Post Office Box 5958
Santa Maria, CA 93456-5958

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-02-068

Dear Mr. Benedetti:

This letter confirms your conversation with Patricia Mayer of March 20, 2000, wherein you advised her that you sought phone advice from the Fair Political Practices Commission. Therefore, we will not provide a written response to your letter of March 15, 2002.

Should you have any future questions, please feel free to contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Very truly yours,

Carla Wardlow
Division Chief
Technical Assistance Division
